name: vdie
description: Vessel Data Ingestion Engine — AIS + ADS-B → Firebase + WS + REST

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/logger.js && node --check src/firebase.js && node --check src/connectors/aisstream.js && node --check src/connectors/opensky.js && node --check src/normalizers/aisNormalizer.js && node --check src/normalizers/adsbNormalizer.js && node --check src/calculators/eta.js && node --check src/calculators/deadReckoning.js && node --check src/calculators/anomaly.js && node --check src/writers/firebaseWriter.js && node --check src/writers/localQueue.js && node --check src/lod/priorityScorer.js && node --check src/transport/wsServer.js && node --check src/transport/restSnapshot.js && node --check src/routes/api.js && node --check src/reaper.js
scripts.test: node tests/schema.test.js && node tests/reaper.test.js && node tests/reaper.integration.test.js && node tests/firebase.test.js && node tests/api.test.js
